name: cuemarshal-mcp-servers
description: MCP servers for the CueMarshal platform

scripts.build:gitea: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w gitea-mcp
scripts.build:conductor: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w conductor-mcp
scripts.build:system: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w system-mcp
scripts.build:vector: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w vector-mcp
scripts.build:sonar: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w sonar-mcp
